---
name: Suggest a rule
about: Propose a new design rule to add to the knowledge base
title: "[RULE] "
labels: rule-suggestion
---

## Rule title
<!-- What would you call this rule? -->

## Category
<!-- color / typography / spacing / shadows / ux-laws / interaction / icons / visual / print -->

## What is the rule?
<!-- State it concisely. Ideally one sentence with a number or threshold. -->

## Why does it matter?
<!-- What research, book, or standard backs this up? -->

## Primary source
<!-- Author, title, year. No "I read somewhere" — needs to be verifiable. -->

## Does it already exist?
<!-- Have you checked the existing rules with list_rules? -->
- [ ] Yes, I checked and this is not already covered
